title: Round Organza Polyester Tablecloth
features: All South Street Tablecloths products are made to order and nonrefundable.
Create an enchanting presentation with the translucent, glitter dusted Organza Fabric made from 100% polyester.
Durable as much as it's beautiful, confidently compliment your tableware and enhance your entire event venue by simply choosing from 1 of 16 different colors.
